hero.headline: Your yard *never looked this good*
hero.subheadline: Same day, same time, same attention to detail. Ask Paula — she's trusted us for ten years.

services_section.label: THE WORK
services_section.heading: From weekly cuts to complete makeovers
services_section.subheading: Everything your yard needs to be the one neighbors notice

services.title: Weekly Lawn Mowing
services.description: Same day, same time reliability. We show up when we say we will, cut to the right height, and leave clean edges every single time.

services.title: Flower Bed Design
services.description: Complete bed redesigns that transform your curb appeal. From soil prep to plant selection, we create beds that bloom beautifully season after season.

services.title: Sprinkler Repair
services.description: Broken heads, clogged lines, timer issues — we diagnose and fix irrigation problems so your grass stays green without waste.

services.title: Fence Installation
services.description: Privacy, boundary, or decorative fencing installed right the first time. Quality materials and proper installation that lasts.

about.heading: Brent knows Columbia yards
about.body: Ten years of the same customers tells you everything. We're Home Pro Lawn Services, and we've been keeping Columbia lawns healthy and beautiful since day one. From Forest Acres to Shandon, we know what grows here and what doesn't. When you need it done right, you call Brent.

reviews.name: Sharon G.
reviews.text: Brent does incredible work — from our weekly mowing to completely redoing our flower beds. Our house has never looked better.

reviews.name: Paula A.
reviews.text: Nearly ten years with Brent and my lawn still looks fabulous every week. He's dependable and knows exactly what my yard needs.

reviews.name: Karen P.
reviews.text: Goes above and beyond every single time. The attention to detail and reliability sets him apart — my yard has never been healthier.

reviews.name: Justin M.
reviews.text: Always on time and my yard stays perfectly maintained. By far the best landscaping service I've ever used.

cta.heading: Ready for a yard that stands out?
cta.body: Call Brent today for a free estimate. Same reliable service that's kept Columbia customers happy for years.
